content.en:
Soon, this auction of Wanfeng Chamber of Commerce began.

At this time.

Many Origin Upper Realm Overlords came to participate in this auction, and there were also some Supreme Dao Realm existences.

However, the level of this auction is not high, so the existence of the Supreme Dao Realm participating in is also average, and there is no too powerful Supreme Dao Realm.

It is also impossible for a truly high-grade auction to be placed on the Liujin Continent, but in a higher-grade place.

on the auction floor.

A Venerable Origin Origin Upper Realm Overlord sat on the thrones in the hall, while those Supreme Dao Realm beings sat in a small space in the dark, where they were relatively hidden, and there was also formation protection, which could hide their identities.

Ye Tian's copied body was only the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm who had awakened eight times, so he could naturally only sit in the hall.

Soon, the auction began.

One resource treasure after another was put up for auction, and any one placed in the reincarnation domain was a priceless treasure and the top resource, but it was sparse and ordinary here.

However, these treasure resources were of little use to Ye Tian.

For him, only the resources of the Supreme Dao Realm were useful to him.

After all, his true strength had already reached the First Dao Realm.

At this time, a very good weapon was auctioned.

"The next auction is a supreme dao weapon, the Cold Star Sword, which is made by the supreme dao weapon casting master Xuan Ion, with a starting price of 30,000 Dao coins!"

The auctioneer said.

The Supreme Dao Coin is a very high-grade currency, suitable for the top Origin Upper Realm Overlord and the Supreme Dao Realm level, the Supreme Dao Coin is made of an incomparably precious material, the Supreme Dao Gold, and there is also a trace of the Supreme Dao rules inside.

Therefore, the value of Zhidao Coin is very high.

The average Nine Awakenings Origin Upper Realm Overlord, all of them may not have 100,000 Dao Coins, and their deposits may not even have 10,000 Dao Coins.

Therefore, the average Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord could not afford to buy this one-pattern supreme weapon.

"A Tattoo of the Dao Weapon!"

Ye Tian was a little moved.

He actually didn't have a one-pattern Supreme Dao weapon, although he used the Supreme Dao rules to refine a weapon, but it definitely couldn't reach the level of a one-pattern Supreme Dao weapon, at most it was a pseudo-one-pattern Supreme Dao weapon.

According to his understanding, if you want to refine a Dao weapon, you must obtain the inheritance of the Dao weapon and learn the Dao rule weapon pattern before you can refine it.

And he doesn't have that legacy.

Soon, one by one, the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords competed for this Cold Star Sword, but in the end, this Cold Star Sword was auctioned off by a Heavy Dao Realm powerhouse.

Next, there were several auctions of Yiwen Zhidao weapons, but Ye Tian didn't participate in it, because he really couldn't afford it.

Most of the resources that he has collected over the years of his replica body have been used up by his own cultivation, and now he has sold a lot of treasure resources, and he has only collected 60,000 Dao coins, which is already very remarkable.

Many of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords are not as valuable as him, but if this money is used to compete for a supreme dao weapon, it will be too unworthwhile, and there will be no way to compete for other things in the future.

Moreover, the Supreme Dao weapon could only be used to improve combat effectiveness, and could not improve true cultivation, which was not what he wanted most.

After another while, an auction item that made Ye Tiandu's heart was finally auctioned.

"The next auction is a copy of the knowledge of the Supreme Dao Inheritance, containing information on how to impact the Dao realm, with a starting price of 20,000 Dao coins!"

The auctioneer said.

For a while, many Origin Upper Realm Overlords were moved.

They are in need of this kind of inheritance knowledge, but this kind of inheritance knowledge is definitely just knowledge, and it can't make the Nine Awakenings Origin Upper Realm Overlord break through, otherwise it wouldn't be this price.

This kind of inheritance knowledge is useless to the Supreme Dao Realm, so there will be no Supreme Dao Realm to compete with, and only those casual cultivators who have no background need this kind of inheritance.

Soon.

A Origin Upper Realm Overlord began to compete, and Ye Tian also participated.

Ultimately.

Ye Tian won this inheritance at a transaction price of 56,000 Dao coins.

"Finally got this inheritance!"

Ye Tian was excited.

All he had to do was wait for the auction to end, and he could go and get his inheritance.

After a while, the appearance of a treasure made many Supreme Dao Realm powerhouses compete frantically.

"The next auction is the Meteor Water, this treasure is very valuable to the Dao Realm, and it can be upgraded to the cultivation of the Dao Realm, with a starting price of 100,000 Dao Coins. The auctioneer shouted.

Soon, the auction price soared to 200,000 Dao Coins, which showed how valuable the treasures that helped the Supreme Dao Realm to improve their cultivation were.

Next, treasures worth hundreds of thousands of Dao coins appeared.

And at the end of the auction, a finale item came on the market, which directly caused a sensation in the audience.

"The last finale item is the Infinite Secret Elixir from the Infinite Heavenly Palace, which can make a Nine-Time Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord have an eighty percent chance of breaking through to the Supreme Dao Realm, with a starting price of 500,000 Dao Coins!!!"

As soon as they heard this, those Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords were extremely excited, but it was a pity that they couldn't afford it.

Besides, they didn't even know how to impact the Dao Realm, and when they bought it, they didn't know how to use it.

Now.

Those Dao realms were also excited, and they all participated in the auction.

They don't need the Infinite Secret Elixir, but they have heirs or descendants who need it, if they can win this Infinite Secret Elixir, they can cultivate a Supreme Dao Realm existence!

There are even some small forces that only have a few Supreme Dao Realms, and if they cultivate one more Supreme Dao Realm, they can make their strength skyrocket.

Therefore, they naturally wanted to cultivate a Supreme Dao Realm at all costs!

"Infinite Secret Medicine, 80% chance!"

Ye Tian was also very excited.

I have to say that the Wuji Heavenly Palace is indeed too powerful, and with the Wuji Secret Medicine, it will definitely be able to cultivate to the Dao Realm powerhouse in batches.

Even cultivators with low talent can forcibly cultivate them to the Supreme Dao Realm.

"600,000 Dao Coins!"

"800,000 Zhidao coins!"

"1,000,000 Dao Coins!"

These Dao Realm powerhouses competed wildly, and finally raised the bidding price to 2 million Dao Coins, and it is still increasing.

In the end, it was auctioned off by a supreme Dao realm powerhouse for 2.5 million supreme dao coins.

So far, the auction has come to a successful conclusion.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian went to the backstage of the auction venue to get the items he auctioned, paid the Zhidao coin, and successfully obtained this inheritance.

After leaving the auction, he immediately went to accept the inheritance.

"You need to make an oath!"

Ye Tian didn't care about this oath, the function of this oath was to prevent the people who had obtained the inheritance from divulging this inheritance, and it was also to prevent a large amount of knowledge from impacting the Dao Realm inheritance from leaking out, which was not a good thing for the major forces.

But this oath could not restrain Ye Tian, he could abandon this copy body at any time, while the other copy bodies would not be bound by the supreme oath.

Therefore, after he obtained this inheritance, he could pass it on to the Tianshan Pavilion and the Terran in the future.
